zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bowes於1415年出生在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，他的父親Sir William Bowes21歲，母親Joan de Greystoke20歲。他於大約1443年與Maud Fitzhugh在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭越可爾約克被列為knight and sheriff of york。他去世於1466年7月28日在英國達勒姆斯特亞拉姆 卡素享年51歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆包維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bowes于1415年出生在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓时，他的父亲Sir William Bowes21岁，母亲Joan de Greystoke20岁。他于大约1443年与Maud Fitzhugh在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰越可爾約克被列为knight and sheriff of york。他去世于1466年7月28日在英国達勒姆斯特亞拉姆 卡素享年51岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆包維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bowes was born in 1415, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, his father, Sir William Bowes, was 21 and his mother, Joan de Greystoke, was 20. He married Maud Fitzhugh about 1443, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. His occupation is listed as knight and sheriff of york in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 28 July 1466, in Streathlam Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Bowes, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bowes est né en 1415, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bowes, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan de Greystoke, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maud Fitzhugh environ 1443, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight and sheriff of york à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1466, à Streathlam Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Bowes, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bowes 1415 in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Bowes 21 und seine Mutter Joan de Greystoke 20. Er hat um 1443 in Durham, England Maud Fitzhugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als knight and sheriff of york in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Juli 1466 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Streathlam Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Bowes, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bowes è nato il nel 1415 nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, il suo padre, Sir William Bowes, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Greystoke, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maud Fitzhugh circa 1443, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight and sheriff of york nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 28 luglio 1466, nel Streathlam Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Bowes, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bowesが1415年にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで生まれた時，父Sir William Bowesは21歳，母Joan de Greystokeは20歳であった。約1443年にイギリスダルハムでMaud Fitzhughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでの職業はknight and sheriff of yorkと記録されている。彼は1466年7月28日にイギリスダルハムストレアスラム カストルで51歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムボウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bowes(이)가 1415년 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Bowes(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Greystoke(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1443년 영국 뒤람에서 Maud Fitzhugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 knight and sheriff of york이었다. 그는 1466년 7월 28일 영국 뒤람 스트리슬램 카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 보우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bowes nasceu em 1415, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Bowes, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Greystoke, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Fitzhugh aproximadamente 1443, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como knight and sheriff of york em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1466, em Streathlam Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Bowes, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bowes родился в 1415 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Bowes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Greystoke, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Fitzhugh около 1443 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии knight and sheriff of york в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 28 июля 1466 г. в местности стритлэм кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности боуесь, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bowes nació en 1415, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Bowes, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan de Greystoke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maud Fitzhugh aproximadamente 1443, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era knight and sheriff of york en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 28 de julio de 1466, en Streathlam Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Bowes, Durham, Inglaterra.
